name: Powershell Local Email Collection
notes:
This rule detects adversaries targeting user email on local systems to collect sensitive information.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Powershell Local Email Collection
SIGMA Description: Adversaries may target user email on local systems to collect sensitive information. Files containing email data can be acquired from a users local system, such as Outlook storage or cache files.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution
when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of [Get-Inbox.ps1 or Microsoft.Office.Interop.Outlook or -comobject outlook.application]
TD_list: APPLY Powershell Local Email Collection on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of [Get-Inbox.ps1 or Microsoft.Office.Interop.Outlook or -comobject outlook.application]
RED_list: Event name: Powershell Local Email Collection
Event description: Detects adversaries targeting user email on local systems to collect sensitive information.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
